_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: Adjacent sections from representative brains with end-stage GBMs from p53 null CKO and p53 R172H CKO mice were stained for H&E, GFAP, Olig2, Ki67, and p53
details: Successfully detected p53 protein expression in tumor tissue sections for histopathological analysis
